title: [FIRRTL] Domain inference should consider control dependencies

features.name: ternary conditional assign with cross-domain select signal
features.description: Code should include a continuous conditional assignment where the select/condition signal originates from a different clock domain than the output and data signals, testing whether the compiler correctly infers domain dependencies introduced by control flow

features.name: mux with mismatched clock domain on select vs data
features.description: Code should include a multiplexer-style assignment where the select input belongs to a different clock domain annotation than the data inputs and output, so that domain inference must propagate control-flow dependencies across domain boundaries
